description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have three jobs: build, formatting, and build-docs, each running on ubuntu-latest. The build job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.6, caches pip dependencies, installs test dependencies, runs pytest with coverage, and uploads the coverage report to Codecov. The formatting job checks the code format using a pre-commit script. The build-docs job builds the documentation by setting up Python 3.6, installing dependencies, and running mkdocs build.
